Candidate routing across finance, crypto, health, context, intelligence, product, automation, operations and general intake.
Official docs, current free tier, terms/licence, security/privacy, cost ceiling, canary and rollback required before adoption.
Weekly delta-only proposal process for repository, contract, licence, security, free-tier, deprecation and incident changes.
Eight competency scenarios, denied actions and automatic failure conditions for safe API discovery and adoption.

completion_assertion: Seven APIVault repository-local work packages advanced. APIVault remains a discovery-only, non-authoritative source; no candidate API, connected staging or production integration is proven.
